keepsakes__featured__book_quote: "You kept looking at her during the ceremony like you were checking she was real. She is."
keepsakes__orders__empty: No orders yet. Pick a keepsake to get started.

keepsakes__book_customizer__not_ready_pi: Pick a book size to continue.
keepsakes__book_customizer__not_ready_no: Add at least one photo to your book.

keepsakes__book_customizer__not_ready_re: {count, plural, one {Remove # photo — this book holds up to {max}.} other {Remove # photos — this book holds up to {max}.}}
keepsakes__book_customizer__size_descrip: Pick the size and page range for your book.
keepsakes__book_customizer__photos_descr: Pick the photos to include. Their order becomes the page order.
keepsakes__book_customizer__photos_empty: No photos yet. Invite guests to upload.
keepsakes__book_customizer__spine_descri: Spine width is calculated automatically once your book is sent for print.
keepsakes__book_customizer__spine_body: Spine width will be calculated based on your final page count and paper stock.
keepsakes__book_customizer__personalize_: Optional touches printed inside your book.
keepsakes__book_customizer__cover_templa: Pick a design and add your photos to it.
keepsakes__book_customizer__cover_color_: Choose a background color for your cover.
keepsakes__book_customizer__cover_text_c: Set a color for each line of cover text.
keepsakes__book_customizer__cover_contra: Low contrast: {elements} may be hard to read on this background.
keepsakes__book_customizer__density_sect: Choose how many photos appear on each page.
keepsakes__book_customizer__density_bala: A mix of one and two per page.
keepsakes__book_customizer__density_asym: Full photos, arranged unevenly with gaps — nothing cropped.
keepsakes__book_customizer__cover_slot_d: Select one photo for this spot on your cover.
keepsakes__book_customizer__dedication_p: For everyone who joined us in celebrating…
keepsakes__book_customizer__price_pages_: {count, plural, one {# extra page} other {# extra pages}} × {perPage}
keepsakes__book_customizer__price_blank_: Includes 1 blank page added for printing.
keepsakes__book_customizer__reserved_pag: Includes 4 pages reserved for your event data & branding (covers, intro & closing).
keepsakes__book_customizer__paper_sectio: Choose the paper finish for your book.
keepsakes__book_customizer__current_coun: Currently: {count, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} selected.
keepsakes__book_customizer__below_min_la: Add {needed, plural, one {# more photo} other {# more photos}} to reach the minimum of {min}.
keepsakes__book_customizer__above_max_la: Remove {extra, plural, one {# photo} other {# photos}} — this book holds up to {max}.
keepsakes__book_customizer__no_variant_l: No option available with these settings. Try a different paper or size.
keepsakes__book_binding__hardcover_hint: Rigid linen-wrapped cover with foil options
keepsakes__book_binding__layflat_hint: Premium photo-grade paper, lays perfectly flat
keepsakes__unsupported_product__body: This product is not currently customisable. Check back soon or browse our other keepsakes.
keepsakes__hero__subtitle: Pick what speaks to you — we print, press, and ship. Every keepsake is built from the messages and photos your guests have already given you.
keepsakes__bundle__title: Gold Book + Thank-You Cards + Digital Album for <emph>€149</emph>
keepsakes__testimonial__1__quote: The book arrived and we both cried. Again.
keepsakes__testimonial__2__quote: Playing the vinyl at our 1-year anniversary was wild.
keepsakes__testimonial__3__quote: Every guest asked where we got the cards.
keepsakes__design__fallback__headline: A piece of the day, kept.
keepsakes__design__gold_book__tagline: A printed hardcover with every guest message, photo, and transcript.
keepsakes__design__softcover__tagline: Every message in a flexible softcover — quicker to print, easier to pass around.
keepsakes__design__layflat__tagline: Lay-flat binding so a single quote can stretch the full width of the page.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__headli: Their words. Their faces. One reel.
keepsakes__design__video_montage__taglin: A 3-minute film stitched from every voice and photo your guests left.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__headline: Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__audio_vinyl__tagline: A real 12" record from your guest audio. Side A: speeches. Side B: chaos.
keepsakes__design__digital_album__taglin: A living album guests can revisit. Share a single link — plays on any device.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__head: Say thanks — in their own photo.
keepsakes__design__thank_you_cards__tagl: Each card features the guest’s own photo and a snippet of what they said.
keepsakes__design__canvas_print__tagline: One favourite quote, typeset on archival canvas. Ready to hang.
keepsakes__media_preview__description: Full-size preview of the selected media item.
keepsakes__book_customizer__photos_requi: Select at least one photo to continue.
